title: Infinispan JDBC Common Cache Store Configuration
description: Base JDBC cache store configuration shared by JDBC and SQL stores.

dialect.description: Specifies the JDBC dialect of the database.

db-major-version.description: Specifies the major version of the database.

db-minor-version.description: Specifies the minor version of the database.

read-query-timeout.description: Defines the timeout, in seconds, for read queries. The default is 0 that indicates no timeout.

write-query-timeout.description: Defines the timeout, in seconds, for write queries. The default is 0 that indicates no timeout.

ConnectionPool.description: Defines a connection pool for the JDBC cache store.

properties-file.description: Sets the path of a properties file that provides additional configuration for the connection pool.

connection-url.description: Sets a connection url specific to a JDBC driver.

driver.description: Specifies the class name of the driver that connects to the database.

password.description: Specifies the password for the database connection.

username.description: Specifies the username for the database connection.

DataSource.description: Defines a datasource for the JDBC connection.

jndi-url.description: Specifies the address of a datasource for the JDBC connection.

CdiDataSource.description: Defines a CDI datasource for the JDBC connection.

name.description: Specifies the name address of a datasource for the JDBC connection.

annotation.description: Specifies the name of the annotation to use as qualifier to lookup a named data source.

SimpleConnection.description: Defines a simple connection for the JDBC cache store.

connection-url.description: Sets a connection url specific to a JDBC driver.

driver.description: Specifies the class name of the driver that connects to the database.

password.description: Specifies the password for the database connection.

username.description: Specifies the username for the database connection.
